result.stdout:
Usage: tktk [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  about         About the app
  conv          Convert a number between different bases
  guid          Generate guids
  json          Json formatting
  pw            Generate passwords
  un            Generate user names
  waffle        Generate waffle

Run 'tktk [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Json formatting

Usage: tktk json [options] <value>

Arguments:
  value                 The Json to convert.

Options:
  -i|--indent <INDENT>  Indent the json true/false.
                        Default value is: True.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

Json formatting

Usage: tktk json [options] <value>

Arguments:
  value                 The Json to convert.

  -i|--indent <INDENT>  Indent the json true/false.
                        Default value is: True.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

result.stdout:
Generate passwords

Usage: tktk pw [options]

Options:
  -g|--gen <GENERATIONS>  The number of passwords to generate.
                          Default value is: 5.
  -l|--len <PW_LENGTH>    The character length of each generated password.
                          Default value is: 32.
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.

result.stdout:
Generate waffle

Usage: tktk waffle [options]

Options:
  -p|--paragraphs <PARAGRAPHS>  The number of paragraphs to generate.
                                Default value is: 1.
  -t|--title                    Include a title
  -s|--seed <SEED>              The RNG's seed integer.
  -r|--render <RENDER>          The render mode.
                                Allowed values are: Text, Markdown, Html.
                                Default value is: Text.
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information.

commands.payload:
Generate waffle

Usage: tktk waffle [options]

Options:
  -p|--paragraphs <PARAGRAPHS>  The number of paragraphs to generate.
                                Default value is: 1.
  -t|--title                    Include a title
  -s|--seed <SEED>              The RNG's seed integer.
  -r|--render <RENDER>          The render mode.
                                Allowed values are: Text, Markdown, Html.
                                Default value is: Text.
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information.
